executive_summary.verdict: BMY is below DCF BUT Lynch collapsed from $169 to $0. Patent cliff is the concern.
executive_summary.key_insight: DCF $65 vs Price $47 = 38% upside. BUT Eliquis and Opdivo facing patent cliffs.

graham.recommendation: Graham not applicable - goodwill from acquisitions

peter_lynch.recommendation: Lynch collapse = market sees no growth ahead

5Y.analysis: DCF declined from $85 to $65 as patent cliff approached

dcf.recommendation: 38% below DCF - but DCF itself is declining

patent_cliff_analysis.eliquis: Blood thinner facing generic competition soon
patent_cliff_analysis.pipeline: Acquisitions (Celgene) added pipeline but execution uncertain

risk_factors.pipeline_risk: Need new drugs to replace lost revenue

bull_case.thesis: Pipeline delivers. Acquisitions pay off. 5%+ dividend yield.

bear_case.thesis: Patent cliff devastates revenue. Pipeline fails. Dividend cut.

key_warning: Lynch collapse from $169 to $0 is a major red flag. Patent cliff is real.
time_horizon: High risk - only for pharma specialists
